description: Legal record (#25) in a court register/pinqas from a Karaite beit din in Cairo (on f. 10r of Yevr.-Arab. I 328). Dated 3 Shevat [5321] AM (1561 CE), with the year implied by the scribe as סנה תארי׳ based on neighboring entries. [Es]tīta(?) bt. Avraham b. Yehuda Rofe receives her meuḥar marital payment of 13 gold jadīd from her ex-husband Moshe ha-Levi. Some key words are damaged in the final lines, but it seems likely that the couple are remarrying soon after their divorce, with mention of their betrothal (קדושים) and probably a new ketubba in ll. 23-25. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
